WITN04660100
WITN04660100
DocuSign Envelope ID: 0B8D9A6F-D117-40AC-B8CA-9EFEBC3C2B1D

3. My involvement in the civil dispute involving Mr Castleton started well over 17 years ago. I recall aspects from personal memory, but given the very considerable amount of time that has elapsed, I do not now recall all of the details.

4. Post Office Limited (POL) has waived legal privilege on certain documents as a result of which the Inquiry has produced to me certain documents from my firm's litigation file in the context of its Rule 9 Request. In order to provide as full a response to the Inquiry as possible, I have also refreshed my memory by reading parts of my firm's file.

5. I make this statement from my own knowledge, but the majority of that knowledge (and therefore this statement) now comes from re-reading documents rather than from my original memory. References to documents with a coding number (commencing POL, LCA, FUJ or WBO) in this statement are to either to documents:

(a) supplied to me by the Inquiry with its Rule 9 Request; or

(b) which I have supplied to the Inquiry from my firm's file in order to provide as full and helpful a response as possible and to which the Inquiry has subsequently allocated a code.

There are a considerable number of such documents. I have no reason to doubt the accuracy of the coding references, but have not been able to independently check them in the time I have been asked to finalise this statement once all the codes were supplied.

Page 2 of 194
